creator: lwhsu@lwhsu.org
text:
- Fix problem when WITH_CODECONV option is enabled

Port maintainer (beech@alaskaparadise.com) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77

How-To-Repeat: 
# cd /usr/ports/ftp/proftpd
# make config
(select CODECONV)
# make
